title: sanicula europaea subsp. elata
intro: Sanicula europaea subsp. elata is a subspecies of the Sanicula europaea plant, commonly known as the Sanicle or Echigoro, which is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne, as well as being used as a diuretic and expectorant. The herbal preparations of Sanicula europaea subsp. elata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
